Summary: Rules page crashes on load when packs contain null rule arrays
Description:
Module: Rules
Impact: Analysts cannot access rule authoring; page crashes before workflow starts.
Repro: Open /rules; observe runtime error and blank page.
Expected: Rules page should render and safely ignore non-rule packs.
Actual: UI throws TypeError on flatMap of undefined.
Acceptance criteria:
- Normalize API payloads before rendering (rules/tag_rules defaults to []).
- Skip non-rule metadata packs or classify them separately.
- Add rules-page error boundary with retry and diagnostics.

Summary: Cases list and supporting endpoints return 500 in core queue workflow
Description:
Module: Cases
Impact: Queue triage unavailable; analysts cannot rely on list, views, or playbooks.
Repro: Open /cases (tenant demo); network shows 500 on /v1/cases, /v1/case-views, /v1/cases/playbooks.
Expected: Queue should load with healthy data or explicit degraded mode.
Actual: Generic 500 with no fallback path.
Acceptance criteria:
- Restore endpoint reliability for list, views, and playbooks.
- Provide typed degraded-state UX with action guidance.
- Include support correlation id in UI error panel.

Summary: Case detail route fails with 500 for valid case ids
Description:
Module: Case Detail
Impact: Analysts cannot open case investigation workspace.
Repro: Navigate to /cases/c1?tenant_id=demo; /v1/cases/c1 returns 500.
Expected: Case detail loads or shows typed not-found/permission state.
Actual: Generic 500 Internal Server Error.
Acceptance criteria:
- Fix case retrieval for valid ids.
- Map failures to typed states (not found, unauthorized, service unavailable).
- Preserve breadcrumb navigation and user context on failure.

Summary: Create Case fails with 500 and leaves modal in ambiguous state
Description:
Module: Cases Create
Impact: Analysts cannot create investigations; confidence drops due ambiguous write state.
Repro: Open New Case, fill required fields, click Create Case; POST /v1/cases returns 500.
Expected: Case created, or field-level validation / actionable error.
Actual: Generic error remains in modal.
Acceptance criteria:
- Restore create-case API success path.
- Return structured errors (validation/system) and map to field/global messages.
- Add idempotency token and duplicate-submit protection.

Summary: Investigation case-context endpoints fail while chat still responds
Description:
Module: Investigation
Impact: Copilot appears available but case grounding is missing; analyst may make decisions on weak context.
Repro: Open /investigation?case_id=c1&tenant_id=demo; graph/decision-explanation return 500 while chat returns 200.
Expected: System should clearly indicate ungrounded mode and disable case-dependent actions.
Actual: Chat continues with generic 500 banner.
Acceptance criteria:
- Add explicit grounding status badge (grounded/degraded/ungrounded).
- Disable case-dependent quick actions when context fetch fails.
- Show one consolidated case-context incident card with retry.

Summary: Copilot responses often surface unverified claim trailer warnings
Description:
Module: Investigation
Impact: Analyst trust erodes when outputs are flagged unknown/unverified after generation.
Repro: Send summary prompt; claim support panel reports missing/invalid structured trailer.
Expected: Valid structured claim provenance for operational outputs.
Actual: Response rendered with unknown-source warnings.
Acceptance criteria:
- Enforce structured claim trailer contract server-side.
- Fail closed for non-compliant responses in high-risk modes.
- Add telemetry for claim-contract adherence rate.

Summary: Sidebar case badge remains confidence signaling during backend failure
Description:
Module: Global Navigation
Impact: Badge counts imply healthy queue when core APIs are failing.
Repro: Observe sidebar 'Cases 3' while case APIs return 500.
Expected: Badge should degrade or hide when source is unhealthy.
Actual: Static/confident badge displayed.
Acceptance criteria:
- Link badge state to live health signal.
- Show degraded indicator and tooltip with data staleness.
- Add freshness timestamp for queue counters.

Summary: Replace API-centric Investigation labels with analyst intent language
Description:
Module: Investigation
Impact: New users face engineering jargon and slower onboarding.
Repro: Observe labels like endpoint names in controls.
Expected: Workflow-oriented language (playbook, evidence check, context scope).
Actual: Internal endpoint phrasing shown in UI.
Acceptance criteria:
- Replace endpoint terms in primary controls.
- Move technical text under advanced disclosure.
- UX copy reviewed with risk ops stakeholder.

Summary: Progressively disclose preset catalog for first-run analysts
Description:
Module: Investigation
Impact: Initial cognitive load is high due large preset inventory.
Repro: Open Investigation and review preset area with many options.
Expected: Starter set first, advanced presets later.
Actual: Broad catalog visible immediately.
Acceptance criteria:
- Add starter preset tier (top 5).
- Group advanced presets behind expandable sections by job-to-be-done.
- Persist user preference/last-used presets.

Summary: Standardize actionable error contract across Cases and Investigation
Description:
Module: Cross-workflow
Impact: Generic 500 errors force manual escalation and slow incident response.
Repro: Trigger failed case endpoints; UI shows repeated generic 500.
Expected: Errors include action guidance, retryability, and support context.
Actual: Generic system message.
Acceptance criteria:
- Shared error schema across APIs (code, message, retryable, support_id).
- Unified frontend error renderer with remediation steps.
- Alerting hooks for recurrent user-visible failures.
